arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag fires warning to Marcus Rashford over party lifestyle amid Man Utd form
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's struggles last season saw him miss out on England's Euro 2024 squad but the forward is hitting some form for Manchester United after three goals in his last two games

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner asked about managing Daniel Munoz’s game time
arts.sum: The 28-year-old has started every outing so far under Glasner and also played 90 minutes in both games against Peru and Argentina for Colombia during the recent international break. “We have two games in the next two weeks, so we don’t have to manage minutes if someone is fit.

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot free transfer swoop for familiar face
arts.sum: The newly-minted England midfielder came through the youth ranks at Old Trafford and is to this day the youngest debutant in the club's modern history. Man Utd want Gomes return

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson opens up on dementia fear and does quizzes to keep his mind sharp
arts.sum: Studies have shown a link between football and an increased risk in developing dementia with several England legends diagnosed before their deaths

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: CB: Matthijs de Ligt - De Ligt joined the club from Bayern Munich along with Mazraoui and produced a standout performance in United's victory over Southampton last weekend. The world was caving in on Erik ten Hag after his side succumbed to an emphatic 3-0 defeat to Liverpool before the international break and, while victories over Southampton and Barnsley will not come to define the Red Devils' campaign, the triumphs supplied plenty of positives for Ten Hag and company.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag now has elite Man United dilemma Pep Guardiola and Mikel Arteta got right
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Erik ten Hag has a luxury of squad depth in the attacking areas that must be utilised efficiently

arts.ttl: Man Utd identify priority January target
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly hoping to sign Rosenborg midfielder Sverre Nypan during the January transfer window. That is according to GiveMeSport, who report that Man Utd were originally planning on signing Nypan next summer, but they are now ready to finalise a deal in January.

arts.ttl: Major Man United injury update: What's the latest on Tyrell Malacia?
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia was able to take part in the warm-up section of his team's training session on Friday.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The blockbuster transfer target Man United 'missed out on during the summer window' despite Erik ten Hag's spending spree
arts.sum: United brought in five new additions before the market slammed shut, strengthening several positions in their bid to win more trophies.

arts.ttl: Manchester United get major injury boost as 11 squad members for Crystal Palace fixture confirmed
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund hasn't played for Man Utd so far this season but the Dane is in the squad to face Crystal Palace on Saturday.
